question:
Read: 'The notion that artificial intelligence will inevitably supplant human workers is an oversimplification. While AI excels at routine, data-intensive tasks, it lacks the nuanced judgment, creativity, and emotional intelligence that many professions demand.'

The author's main argument is that:
question_vi:
Đọc: 'The notion that artificial intelligence will inevitably supplant human workers is an oversimplification. While AI excels at routine, data-intensive tasks, it lacks the nuanced judgment, creativity, and emotional intelligence that many professions demand.'

Luận điểm chính của tác giả là:
options: AI will definitely replace all human workers
AI cannot do any tasks better than humans
The impact of AI on employment is more complex than often portrayed
Humans should not use AI at all
